name: Baked Apples with Dried Cherries & Maple Cara
recipeIngredient: 4 Gala apples, peeled and cored, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried tart cherries and cherry flavored brandy in a small bowl. Let stand until the cherries are plump, about 20 minutes.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Using a melon baller or small spoon, hollow out the center of each apple half.
4. Arrange the apple halves, cut side up, in a glass baking dish.
5. Fill the centers with the cherry mixture, dividing evenly among the apples.
6. In a heavy saucepan, combine the brown sugar, pure maple syrup, and unsalted butter. Heat over low heat until the ingredients are melted and well combined.
7. Drizzle the sauce over and around the apples in the baking dish.
8. Bake the apples in the preheated oven for about 55 minutes, basting frequently with the sauce.
9. Remove the apples from the oven and arrange them on plates.
10. Place a scoop of vanilla frozen yogurt alongside each apple.
11. Drizzle any remaining sauce over the apples and serve.
